title: Turn off certain functionality that is not always needed on certain board types
excerpt: It would be useful to have a board level option to completely turn off certain features such as Grouping and Updates. Very simple boards don’t always need these and they take up valuable space, particularly when using th…

posts.author: NicBar (Nick Barrett)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be useful to have a board level option to completely turn off certain features such as Grouping and Updates. Very simple boards don’t always need these and they take up valuable space, particularly when using the mobile app.
